pages.text: A Waystone is an etched piece of $(item)Flint$() that is an important foci for $(l:circle_magic/intro)Circle Magic$(/l), especially if it involves $(l:circle_magic/transposition/to_waystone)Transposition$(/l).

A Bound Waystone is a Waystone that is bound to a specific location. A Waystone can be bound either by using the appropriate $(l:circle_magic/binding/waystone)Rite of Binding$(/l) or its $(l:circle_magic/other/bind_waystone)alternate version$(/l).

A Blooded Waystone is a Waystone that is bound with the appropriate Rite of Binding, to either $(l:circle_magic/binding/waystone#bind_player)players$(/l) or $(l:circle_magic/binding/waystone#bind_creature)other creatures$(/l).
